template_data.headline_html: What changes when the pricing finally fits.
template_data.image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left dark navy panel, bold label 'BEFORE' with red X icon. Three short 2-3 word labels stacked: 'RATES TOO HIGH', 'ZERO AWARDS', 'LOST BIDS'. Right cream panel, bold label 'AFTER' with green checkmarks. Three short labels stacked: 'MARKET RATES', 'FIRST AWARD', 'PIPELINE LIVE'. Center: illustrated professional in suit reviewing a contract document at a desk. Bold headline across top: 'WRONG PRICE. NO CONTRACT. EVER.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
